name: pact-notifications
_note: insurance.pact-notifications surfaces expiry / premium-due / handshake / fired / payout-received alerts for the caller's inheritance pacts. STATE-backed, per-user via the internal owner actor, so {} returns ok:true with an empty notifications list (NEVER no_db). windowDays is a fail-CLOSED numeric guard. count equals notifications.length; unreadHigh counts high-severity notes.
